data.body: 264f plan PASS+signed after 16 rounds (most demanding leaf - deep reconciler integration). Definitive design: resolution in FLOW layer (outbound_differ/dispatch_one, not stdlib-boundary acli.py); assignee fast-path via jira_account_id -> accountId + _assignee_is_account_id sentinel in fields dict -> dispatch_one pops -> acli.update_issue bool skips validate_assignee_exists; reporter = dedicated _update_one_apply_reporter (pop before filter like parent) -> set_reporter via _direct_rest_put_raw, HTTP-only degrade via lazy alert_store; /user/search transient bootstrap w/ identity_email + exact-match; _assignee_resolver 3-tuple. CLAIMING 264f. Fold advisory: _assignee_cache must store 3-tuples too.
